text: The new recommendations are really good! Found exactly what I was looking for.
Payment failed once when trying to buy a recommended item. Worked on retry though.
New recommendation feature is interesting. Still figuring out how it works.
@PurpleMerit loving the personalized recommendations! Very relevant to my interests.
App has been a bit slower since the update. Not terrible but noticeable.
Recommendations are okay. Some are relevant, others not so much.
Got an error on the recommendations page once. Not consistent but worth mentioning.
Great feature! The AI really understands my preferences. Bought 2 items already.
Good concept but needs some refinement. Has potential.
Really enjoying the personalized experience. Recommendations feel tailored.
Some recommendations don't match my style. Hope it learns over time.
When it works well, it's brilliant! Found some amazing products.
App performance seems slightly degraded since the update.
Recommendations are hit or miss. Sometimes great, sometimes off.
Love the personalized touch! Recommendations feel tailored to my needs.
Feature has potential but needs polish. 3 stars for now.
The recommendations are quite good for me! Discovering new products.
Impressed with how relevant the suggestions are. Good job!
App feels a bit different than before. Recommendations are nice though.
Had one payment issue today but it resolved on retry. Minor concern.
